_comment: Hand-labeled eval set for retrieval recall@k. Each question is tagged with the page number(s) in data/sample.pdf that actually contain the answer (verified against the source text). A retrieval is a 'hit' if any top-k chunk comes from a relevant page.

questions.question: What are the three basic types of packages used for transporting radioactive material?
What are the techniques for disposing of radioactive waste?
What are the steps to follow when dealing with a radioactive spill?
What is a Radiological Dispersal Device (RDD) or dirty bomb?
What is wipe testing used to detect?
What is the annual effective dose equivalent limit for individual members of the public?
Which agency controls the use and distribution of radioactive materials in the United States?
What are personnel dosimeters and what are the two general types?
By how much can the administered activity vary from the prescribed activity for therapeutic radioactive substances?
What types of energy does a nuclear weapon give off when it explodes?
What is the annual dose limit for the lens of the eye?
